state.next-action:
Phase 38 shipped (2026-04-12): skill candidates auto-drafted from high-pressure phases. Phase 35 model-profile restoration shipped (2026-04-12): off-by-default profile resolution restored for GAD workflows and Claude SDK sessions, with live verification that balanced resolves to Sonnet and budget resolves to Haiku in real Claude sub-sessions.
=== SHIPPED === - Restored shared model-profile resolution with default `off` semantics and workflow model emission in gad-tools init - Claude SDK sessions now use live-safe Claude aliases (`sonnet` / `haiku` / `opus`) instead of stale frozen model IDs - Added an opt-in live integration test for real model switching plus one-shot manual verification via SessionInit events - compute-self-eval.mjs now auto-drafts SKILL.md candidates for every high-pressure phase - 12 candidates landed in .agents/skills/candidates/ (phase-10, 12, 13, 14, 14.5, 17, 18, 20, 21, 22, 30, 34) - Candidates have status: candidate, category: System, origin: auto-drafted in frontmatter - build-site-data.mjs catalog scanner now excludes candidates/ directory (quarantined from live catalog) - PlanningSkillCandidatesTab component with info icon HoverCard explaining the feedback loop - New "Skill candidates" tab on /planning page showing draft metadata, source phase, and task list expansion
=== DECISIONS === GAD-D-144: Skill candidates quarantine and review workflow GAD-D-146: Claude-facing model profiles use aliases and stay off by default
=== NEXT === 1. Execute phase 35-01 through 35-03 (runtime identity) — model switching now works, telemetry attribution still needs to land 2. Execute phase 36 (per-eval repos + command split) 3. Phase 37 (gad project) queued, depends on 36 4. Manually review 12 candidates on the site and decide: promote, merge, or discard
=== SELF-EVAL (latest) === 3,468 events | 191 tasks (185 done) | 141 decisions Framework overhead: 23.5% | Loop compliance: 80% Skill candidates: 12
